===Pokémon Ruby-Sapphire===
[[File:Roxanne PMRS.png|thumb|135px|Roxanne in Pokémon Pocket Monsters]]
Roxanne appeared in ''[[PMRS09|Clefairy's Training Camp!!]]'', where she encountered {{OBP|Red|Pocket Monsters}} as she was carrying groceries. She invited him and his Pokémon to come with her to her [[Gym]], which doubles as a Pokémon School. Roxanne showed them inside, where her {{p|Nosepass}} was reading a book. Roxanne explained that she wanted Nosepass to study hard in order to get a good job elsewhere, but that he was not cooperating the way she wanted. Red and his Pokémon agreed to try and help. After much sightseeing with Nosepass, they managed to have him work as a picnic table. Pleased with the decision, Roxanne wanted to give them the {{badge|Stone}}, but they decided to give her a doughnut instead.
